signin.description_text: At NUTROIC, we provide all the tools you need for a healthy lifestyle in one place. Track your daily nutrient intake, get recommendations tailored to your goals, and rely on our analysis to optimize your diet. Sign up now!

signup.desc: Hi there! Please tell us about yourself so we can better serve you.
signup.name: Name

main.name: {name}!
main.greeting_desc: Reach your goals with our monthly nutrition plan!

scan_meal.analyze_manual_ai_hint: Analyze with AI by entering food name and amount...
scan_meal.meal_title: When did you eat this meal?
scan_meal.name: Food Name
scan_meal.no_meal: It seems you haven't added any meals for today...

create_program.title: Personal Program Coach
create_program.greeting: Let's create your personalized nutrition program
create_program.allergy_hint: If you have any allergies, please add them here...

create_program.main_target3: I want to develop healthy habits

create_program.sweet_freq_title: How Often Do You Eat Sweets?
create_program.water_freq_title: How Often Do You Drink Water?
create_program.water_freq4: More than 10 glasses a day (2.5+ liters)

more.title: Settings

internet.title: Oops...

analysis.title: Analysis
analysis.i_need: Calories (kcal) I need to consume daily
analysis.locked: To view your analysis graphs and get detailed AI-powered nutrition analysis, you need to unlock this page.

onboarding.p1title: Your First Step to a Healthy Life
onboarding.p1desc: We help you lead a healthy life with AI-powered nutrition tracking. We are here to help you reach your personal goals.
onboarding.p2desc: Easily log your daily meals and improve your eating habits with AI support.
onboarding.p3desc: Create personalized nutrition plans tailored to your goals and needs with AI support.
onboarding.p4desc: Observe your monthly nutrition summaries and improve your eating habits with AI analysis.
onboarding.p5title: Take the First Step Towards Your Healthy Life
onboarding.p5desc: Reaching your goals has never been easier. Sign up now and start our AI-powered nutrition tracking!
